reason_for_decision: The article is clear, technically grounded, and strong enough to pass as a Foundation entry on phased array radar without revision.
strengths: The article gives beginners a clean distinction between mechanical scanning and electronic beam steering.
The AESA section prevents a common classification mistake by treating phased array as the broader umbrella concept.
The performance and limits sections add practical judgment instead of reducing the topic to a simple speed claim.
summary_assessment: This is a strong Foundation article: it is readable, technically responsible, and useful enough to pass without revision.
